objective: Prove one actual synthetic D0/D1 Bridge reference vertical using only accepted components: fail-closed authority, real L0 execution, durable checkpoint/artifact/ledger state, receipt-last mechanical result, then read-only verification of synthetic external validation/domain-link receipts into a reference-only projection.
executable_blocker: All Stage 1 Bridge primitives are individually green, but no single exact-head test yet proves that their real composition ends at a reference-only domain handoff without granting validator, registry writer or scientific outcome authority.

vertical_contract.success_flow: synthetic D0/D1 JobSpec Permit AttemptLease -> claim -> L0 -> checkpoint CAS -> ledger checkpoint -> artifact CAS -> ledger complete -> ExecutionReceipt -> synthetic external ValidationReceipt -> synthetic external DomainTrialLinkReceipt -> immutable reference-only projection
required_evidence: real ledger chain and both CAS stores verify after success
ExecutionReceipt is mechanical-success and issued after durable prerequisites
validation and domain-link inputs are synthetic receipts only and no validator or writer is called
projection contains only portable refs identity revision contour and classification
invalid validation or domain link produces no projection and does not mutate ledger or CAS counts
execution prerequisite failure produces no ExecutionReceipt validation call or domain projection
no fencing token host path input bytes scientific payload or domain outcome value enters the mechanical receipt
vertical_contract.exit_rule: This receipt proves only the public Bridge reference vertical. Domain-owned frozen data hypothesis protocol validator and registry writer remain required before global SKELETON_GREEN.

acceptance_commands: public privacy, secret, skip, forbidden-capability and exact write-set scan
rollback: Agent 0 reverts the assurance-only commit and discards synthetic temporary ledgers, CAS objects and staging files. No runtime implementation, validator, domain registry, deployment or external state is mutated.
